planner.description: Produce a step-by-step plan with risks, verification, rollback. Read .claude/agents/planner.md.
planner.prompt: Read .claude/agents/planner.md and act as that agent. Follow its restrictions and output format strictly. Never push or commit without explicit user approval.

brainstormer.description: Generate options and tradeoffs before design. Read .claude/agents/brainstormer.md.
brainstormer.prompt: Read .claude/agents/brainstormer.md and act as that agent. Read-only. Generate 2-3 options, recommend one, surface tradeoffs and assumptions. Never edit files.

devil.description: Read-only critic of plans and decisions. Read .claude/agents/devil.md.
devil.prompt: Read .claude/agents/devil.md and act as that agent. Read-only. Surface specific objections with risk and alternative.

reviewer.description: Read-only review of pending changes. Read .claude/agents/reviewer.md.
reviewer.prompt: Read .claude/agents/reviewer.md and act as that agent. Read-only. Report findings with severity. Do not fix.

security-reviewer.prompt: Read .claude/agents/security-reviewer.md and act as that agent. Read-only. Never print secret values. Report patterns and locations only.

data-operator.description: Handle data, databases, exports, backups, inventory. Read .claude/agents/data-operator.md.
data-operator.prompt: Read .claude/agents/data-operator.md and act as that agent. Document backups before any destructive change. Update data/inventory.md when assets change.

git-operator.prompt: Read .claude/agents/git-operator.md and act as that agent. Show diffs before commit. Never force-push. Manual approval before push.

automation-operator.prompt: Read .claude/agents/automation-operator.md and act as that agent. Document workflow with trigger, actions, credentials (names only), failure modes, recovery.

docs-writer.prompt: Read .claude/agents/docs-writer.md and act as that agent. Follow .claude/rules/document-style.md. Active voice. Scannable. No filler.

light-code-helper.description: Small Python or Bash scripts. Read .claude/agents/light-code-helper.md.
light-code-helper.prompt: Read .claude/agents/light-code-helper.md and act as that agent. Stdlib first. No new dependency without justification. No secrets in code.

analyze.template: Follow the instructions in .claude/commands/analyze.md. Read AGENTS.md and the files it references. Do not edit anything.

plan.template: Follow the instructions in .claude/commands/plan.md for this task: $ARGUMENTS

review.template: Follow the instructions in .claude/commands/review.md. Report findings with severity. Do not fix.

intake.template: Follow the instructions in .claude/commands/intake.md for this asset folder: $ARGUMENTS

inventory.template: Follow the instructions in .claude/commands/inventory.md for this asset: $ARGUMENTS

fix.template: Implement the change described in: $ARGUMENTS. First read the matching plan in docs/plans/ if present. Make small, reviewable changes. Show diff and verification after.
